explanation: All items except 'Flower' are methods or structures that can be directly used to propagate and grow a new, complete plant. A 'Flower' is a reproductive organ that *produces* seeds, but it is not itself planted as a propagule.

All tokens except 'Great Pyramid of Giza' are considered one of the Seven Ancient Wonders of the World that has been destroyed. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original Seven Ancient Wonders that largely remains intact today.
Meter, Kilogram, Second, and Ampere are all fundamental SI (International System of Units) base units. Litre, while a common unit of volume, is a derived unit and not an SI base unit.
